description: Held-out pairs for reporting final precision only. MUST NOT be used to choose MATCH_THRESHOLD (see calibration.json for that) — this set exists purely to catch threshold overfitting to the calibration set.

cases.sentence: Adults using a transit card pay 1400 won as the base Seoul Metro fare.
cases.candidateText: The Seoul Metro base fare is 1400 won for adults with a transit card.

cases.sentence: District offices charge 53000 won to reissue a passport.
cases.candidateText: The passport reissue fee is 53000 won when applied at a district office.

cases.sentence: A new resident has 14 days to file a move-in report after relocating.
cases.candidateText: Move-in reports must be filed within 14 days of the move.

cases.sentence: Cherry blossoms bloom in Seoul during early April.

cases.sentence: Passport photos must show a neutral facial expression.

cases.sentence: 교통카드를 쓰는 성인은 서울 지하철 기본요금으로 1400원을 낸다.
cases.candidateText: 서울 지하철 기본요금은 성인 교통카드 기준 1400원입니다.
여권 재발급 수수료는 주민센터 신청 기준 53000원입니다.
서울 지하철 기본요금은 성인 교통카드 기준 1400원입니다.
